title: Glow bug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Glow bugs''' were glowing insects from [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].

Another species of '''glow bugs''' were bioengineered insects used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to provide lighting in all manner of spaces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
